title: delphinium nuttallii subsp. ochroleucum
intro: Delphinium nuttallii subsp. ochroleucum is a subspecies of the Delphinium nuttallii plant, commonly known as the mountain delphinium or Nootka delphinium, a perennial flowering plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Delphinium nuttallii subsp. ochroleucum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
